member.name: T:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.PagedResponse`1
member.summary: Represents a page of API results together with paging metadata.
member.typeparam: The item type contained in the current page.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.PagedResponse`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{`0},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.PagedResponse`1.Items
member.summary: Gets the items in the current page.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.PagedResponse`1.Page
member.summary: Gets the current one-based page number.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.PagedResponse`1.PageSize
member.summary: Gets the requested page size.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.PagedResponse`1.TotalCount
member.summary: Gets the total number of matching items before paging.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.PagedResponse`1.TotalPages
member.summary: Gets the total number of pages available for the current page size.

member.name: T:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.Requests.GetServicesRequest
member.summary: Represents query-string filters, sort options, and paging controls for the services collection endpoint.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.Requests.GetServicesRequest.Category
member.summary: Gets the category slug filter.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.Requests.GetServicesRequest.Featured
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether only featured services should be returned.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.Requests.GetServicesRequest.BookableOnline
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether only online-bookable services should be returned.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.Requests.GetServicesRequest.Search
member.summary: Gets the free-text search term applied to service names and descriptions.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.Requests.GetServicesRequest.Page
member.summary: Gets the one-based page number to return.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.Requests.GetServicesRequest.PageSize
member.summary: Gets the number of items to return per page.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.Requests.GetServicesRequest.Sort
member.summary: Gets the sort field. Supported values are displayOrder, durationMinutes, name, and price.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.Requests.GetServicesRequest.Direction
member.summary: Gets the sort direction. Supported values are asc and desc.

member.name: T:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategoryDetailResponse
member.summary: Represents the detailed service category resource returned by a single-item lookup.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategoryDetailResponse.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceSummaryResponse})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategoryDetailResponse.Id
member.summary: Gets the category identifier.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategoryDetailResponse.Name
member.summary: Gets the category display name.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategoryDetailResponse.Slug
member.summary: Gets the stable slug used in URLs and client lookups.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategoryDetailResponse.Description
member.summary: Gets the short descriptive text for the category.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategoryDetailResponse.DisplayOrder
member.summary: Gets the configured display order for presentation.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategoryDetailResponse.ServiceCount
member.summary: Gets the number of active services in the category.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategoryDetailResponse.Services
member.summary: Gets the active services that belong to the category.

member.name: T:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategoryReferenceResponse
member.summary: Represents a compact category reference embedded in a service response.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets the category identifier.

member.summary: Gets the category display name.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategoryReferenceResponse.Slug
member.summary: Gets the category slug.

member.name: T:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategorySummaryResponse
member.summary: Represents a lightweight service category view for collection responses.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets the category identifier.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategorySummaryResponse.Name
member.summary: Gets the user-facing category name.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategorySummaryResponse.Slug
member.summary: Gets the stable slug used in URLs and client lookups.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceCategorySummaryResponse.Description
member.summary: Gets the short descriptive text for the category.

member.summary: Gets the configured display order for presentation.

member.summary: Gets the number of active services in the category.

member.name: T:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse
member.summary: Represents the detailed service resource returned by a single-item lookup.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets the service identifier.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse.Name
member.summary: Gets the service display name.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse.Slug
member.summary: Gets the stable slug used in URLs and client lookups.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse.ShortDescription
member.summary: Gets the short marketing summary for the service.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse.FullDescription
member.summary: Gets the full detailed description for the service.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse.Price
member.summary: Gets the configured price when a numeric price is available.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse.PricingType
member.summary: Gets the pricing mode, for example From or Fixed.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse.DurationMinutes
member.summary: Gets the expected appointment duration in minutes when known.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse.IsFeatured
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the service is featured in marketing surfaces.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse.IsBookableOnline
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the service can be requested online.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse.DisplayOrder
member.summary: Gets the configured display order for presentation.

member.name: P:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.ServiceDetailResponse.Category
member.summary: Gets the parent category reference for the service.

member.name: T:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Controllers.Api.ServiceCategoriesController
member.summary: Exposes public service category endpoints used by frontend clients and external consumers.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Controllers.Api.ServiceCategoriesController.#ctor(LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Services.IPublicCatalogApiService)
member.summary: Exposes public service category endpoints used by frontend clients and external consumers.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Controllers.Api.ServiceCategoriesController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all active service categories as summary resources.
member.param: The request cancellation token.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Controllers.Api.ServiceCategoriesController.GetBySlug(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single active service category by slug.
member.param: The stable category slug.
The request cancellation token.

member.name: T:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Controllers.Api.ServicesController
member.summary: Exposes public service catalog endpoints used by frontend clients and external consumers.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Controllers.Api.ServicesController.#ctor(LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Services.IPublicCatalogApiService)
member.summary: Exposes public service catalog endpoints used by frontend clients and external consumers.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Controllers.Api.ServicesController.GetAll(LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Contracts.PublicApi.Requests.GetServicesRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of active salon services.
member.param: The query-string filters, paging options, and sort options.
The request cancellation token.
member.returns: A paged collection of service summaries.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Controllers.Api.ServicesController.GetBySlug(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single active service by slug.
member.param: The stable service slug.
The request cancellation token.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Services.FormInputSanitizer.ControlCharactersRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[\\u0000-\\u001F\\u007F]+
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [\0-\u001F\u007F] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Services.FormInputSanitizer.UnsafeControlCharactersRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[^\\P{Cc}\\n\\t]+
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [^\t\n\P{Cc}] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Services.FormInputSanitizer.MultiWhitespaceRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\s{2,}
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least twice.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Services.FormInputSanitizer.MultiBlankLinesRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\n{3,}
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match '\n' atomically at least 3 times.

member.name: M:LevelsOnIceSalon.Web.Services.FormInputSanitizer.HtmlTagRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
<[^>]+>
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match '<'.
○ Match a character other than '>' atomically at least once.
○ Match '>'.

member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ControlCharactersRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ControlCharactersRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfAnyWhiteSpace(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Finds the next index of any character that matches a whitespace character.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfNonAsciiOrAny_059FB7E2902DF46DEF49BEE5AEE833143B43197D9852B4A383BF611865C1C019(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Finds the next index of any character that matches a character in the set [^\t\n\P{Cc}].

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiExceptWhiteSpace
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "\0\u0001\u0002\u0003\u0004\u0005\u0006\a\b\u000e\u000f\u0010\u0011\u0012\u0013\u0014\u0015\u0016\u0017\u0018\u0019\u001a\u001b\u001c\u001d\u001e\u001f!\"#$%&'()*+,-./0123456789:;<=>?@ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ[\\]^_`abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz{|}~\u007f".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_60000FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF7F
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "\t\n !\"#$%&'()*+,-./0123456789:;<=>?@ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ[\\]^_`abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz{|}~".
